_comment: Recipe manifest for the baked-3D tier. Each recipe is a GENERATIVE SPACE (param ranges), not a preset (principles/3d-baked.md). The spread seam: spread.mjs assigns a best-of-N candidate an {archetype, mechanism} cell; map that cell's character onto recipe + param ranges below, varying `seed` per candidate, so the baked outputs spread instead of repeating. Ranges are guidance for sampling, not hard limits.

noise_scale.note: lobe frequency; high = more, smaller lobes

crystal.form: faceted irregular gem / shard (hard hero); always flat-shaded

shared_params_note: All recipes also accept the shared render params in stage.DEFAULTS (res, samples, device, material, accent, transparent, glb, smooth, mode [still|loop], frames, fps, view_transform, world_strength, hdri). See tools/blender-render.md.
